name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We saw you cancelled your plan with Bright Smile Dental — totally okay, no pressure at all. Taking care of your teeth shouldn't feel stressful, and neither should coming back.

If you ever want to pick up where we left off, here's 20% off your next visit (cleaning, check-up, or a fresh new-patient consult — your call):

{{coupon.code}}

It's good for the next 14 days. Just mention it when you book, or apply it at checkout.

And if something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd really like to hear about it — just hit reply. A real person reads every message.

Take care either way,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — just a quick heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} expires in a few days. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure. Reply STOP to opt out.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
